message:
feat(agent): add watch command for continuous monitoring with notifications

New AgentWatchArgs with configurable options:
- --notify-exec: Execute command/webhook when events trigger
- --threshold: Trigger sensitivity (low|medium|high|critical)
- --interval: Check interval in seconds (default: 60)
- --min-age: Only consider processes older than threshold
- --once: Run single iteration and exit
- --goal-memory-available-gb: Alert when memory drops below
- --goal-load-max: Alert when 1-min load exceeds threshold

WatchSeverity enum (Low → Critical) for categorizing alerts

WatchCandidate struct capturing:
- start_id for deduplication
- severity level
- confidence score
- classification and command info

run_agent_watch() implementation:
- Loads config and priors
- Runs quick scans at interval
- Tracks baseline for delta detection
- Filters candidates by threshold and min_age
- Emits JSONL notifications to stdout
- Optionally executes notify-exec command

Action module (action/mod.rs):
- Minor supporting addition

Process table (process_table.rs):
- Small adjustment for plan preview

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
